role: Provides the infrastructure layer for file system interaction, integrity verification, and manifest state persistence in the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively, these components manage file metadata snapshots, compute SHA-256 hashes for integrity, resolve file paths, read/write JSON manifest and language snapshot files, track file drift history, and persist runtime state. They form the foundation for reliable file status tracking and manifest baseline detection.

children.role: Infrastructure facade for manifest state persistence, file status tracking, and drift history management.
Infrastructure utility for computing SHA-256 file hashes with filesystem validation and SpineDB status integration.

Infrastructure utility module that provides deterministic file path resolution, JSON file reading with null safety, and filesystem status snapshots for the ArchSpine manifest and language snapshot subsystem.
Infrastructure facade module providing manifest file persistence, reverse index state tracking, and language snapshot I/O for the ArchSpine system.
TypeScript interface defining a data structure for file metadata snapshots within the ArchSpine mirror system.
